message:
refactor(mail): consolidate mail_inbox.go into mail.go and clean up comments

Merge mail inbox functionality into the main mail.go file and remove
redundant code comments in the conflict detection module.

Mail Module Consolidation (internal/cli/mail.go):
- Merge all inbox-related code from mail_inbox.go into mail.go
- Add sync, sort, and filepath imports for inbox functionality
- Expand send command documentation with detailed examples
- Fix indentation for body assignment in file reading
- Single-file approach reduces cognitive overhead and import complexity

File Removal:
- Delete internal/cli/mail_inbox.go (functionality moved to mail.go)
- All tests remain valid as function signatures unchanged

Conflict Detection Cleanup (internal/tracker/conflicts.go):
- Remove verbose inline comments explaining obvious logic
- Keep code self-documenting with clear variable names
- Reduce visual noise without losing clarity
- Comments were: "Check if different agents involved", "Collect all unique agents",
  "If only 1 agent ever touched it, no conflict"

This consolidation improves maintainability by keeping related mail
functionality together and removes comments that restated what the
code already clearly expressed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
